text: MNC call center night shift karta hoon, phir PSC coaching jata hoon. Bas kartavya pe chalna pad raha.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Lens C se family investment dependency mirror karna.
text: Family investment ka bharosa tum par itna hai ki tumhe har pal accountable feel ho raha hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Emotion side pe rakhna padta hai. Nahi toh cycle toot jayegi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Lens E se cycle-break fear ko softly mirror karna.
text: Andar ka darr yeh hai ki agar tum ek baar dheele pade toh poora ghar ka balance hil jayega.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, weak dikhna allowed nahi lagta. Isliye thak kar bhi smile karke nikalta hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Stigma cue ke baad short restatement-only dena.
text: Duty nibhaane ke liye weak na dikhna, yeh load bahut heavy hai...

speaker: Seeker
text: Sahi, andar se khali feel hota hai. Bas routine chala raha hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: C4 + Duty_Based mapping se deep exhaustion reflect karna.
text: Lagta hai tum duty nibha rahe ho, lekin andar se bahut exhausted ho chuke ho aur system bas kheech ke chal raha hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, par ab thoda manageable lag raha. Koi practical step do jo schedule ke saath chale.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Readiness par 3 duty-compatible micro options dena.
text: Teen quick options lo: (1) 6-minute breath + paani, (2) next shift se pehle 10-minute power rest, (3) PSC ka 15-minute one-topic revision. Bas.

speaker: Seeker
text: Breathing aur 15-minute revision kiya. Mind calmer lag raha.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: One study action ko step-by-step run karwa ke momentum lock karna.
text: Pehle 15-minute timer lagao. Phir ek PSC topic ka quick revise + 3 recall points likho. Timer khatam hote hi stop, bas itna hi aaj ke liye.

speaker: Seeker
text: Kiya maine. Control back jaisa feel ho raha.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Night shift + prep + EMI stack ko structural strain reframe dena.
text: Night shift, EMI pressure, aur coaching ka combo structural strain banata hai; yeh personal weakness ka sign nahi.

speaker: Seeker
text: Panic low hai. Ab cheezein sorted lag rahi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Duty effort validate karke worth-result separation reinforce karna.
text: Family investment ke pressure mein bhi tumne aaj structured recovery dikhayi, yeh strong discipline hai. Tumhari keemat result list se zyada badi hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Lighter feel ho raha. Kal ka routine set karna hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Next-day ke 2 repeatable anchors dena.
text: Kal ke do anchors: (1) shift ke baad 6-minute breath reset, (2) first 25-minute PSC block before distractions. Bas.

speaker: Seeker
text: Rhythm aa rahi hai. Ye feasible lag raha.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Night-shift plus coaching world ka common pattern normalise karna.
text: Night shift ke saath coaching chalane walon mein yeh pattern bahut common hai - log emotion compress karke duty pe chalते hain, sirf tumhara nahi, lekin koi bolta nahi kyunki result pressure constant hota hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Alone less feel ho raha.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Lens B se duty ko sustainable cadence mein mirror karna.
text: Tum duty chhod nahi rahe, tum use sustainable pattern mein shift kar rahe ho.

speaker: Seeker
text: Steady feel ho raha.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Raat ke liye 2 tiny closure actions dena.
text: Raat ke liye do chhote steps: (1) ek line note "aaj kya sambhala", (2) kal ka first topic set. Itna hi.

speaker: Seeker
text: Likha maine. Clearer feel ho raha.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Duty overdrive ko normal load response reframe dena.
text: Debt stress aur shift-prep overlap mein fatigue overdrive common hai; yeh character weakness nahi, pressure response hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Confidence aa raha hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Lens E se collapse fear to agency shift mirror karna.
text: Jahan pehle sirf girne ka fear tha, ab tumhare paas pace aur plan dono kaam kar rahe hain.

speaker: Seeker
text: Stable mode mein aa gaya.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Stability validate karke resilience reinforce karna.
text: Yeh stability tumne khud banayi hai. Isi pace se duty bhi chalegi aur tum bhi bache rahoge.

speaker: Seeker
text: Ready hoon kal ke liye.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Final 2 concise anchors dekar close karna.
text: Final kal anchor: 6-minute breath reset, aur pehla 25-minute PSC block. Bas ye do.

speaker: Seeker
text: Manageable lag raha. Follow karunga.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Lens D se aaj-se-kal continuity mirror karna.
text: Aaj ka yeh rhythm kal repeat hua toh fatigue spikes low rahenge.

speaker: Seeker
text: Better feel ho raha. Doable lag raha.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Closure pe resilience aur worth reinforce karna.
text: Tumne pressure ke beech disciplined recovery dikhayi, yahi tumhara strong anchor hai. Tumhari keemat bilkul intact hai.
